flags: our damage is 4/5 magical — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of it

notes: Their main damage was Gadget (42k magical); 2/5 of you itemized magic resist.
Enemy ran 2/5 on or near their meta core.

draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Willy Guggenheim (offlane→jungle).

coaching.headline: Four favored lanes wasted on a steady drip of forced fights into a fed Gadget.
coaching.team: Carry, mid, offlane and jungle all read favored — and you still went down 23 objective kills to 4. The problem was relentless bad trades and forced fights: you died in the open early (3.9, 9.8), then threw the big ones — 1-4 at their Mini Prime (20.5) and 1-5 at their Fangtooth (23.7) sealed it. You won a real fight at 19.6 (3-2) and immediately gave it back at 20.5. Their healer was Gadget and your team was 4/5 magical damage — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of your output, which is the comp flag. Stop committing the full squad into their objectives; at 4 majors to their 23 you were fighting on their terms all game.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Forcing fights into a fed Gadget on their side — the 1-4 at their Mini Prime (20.5) and 1-5 at their Fangtooth (23.7) — while your 4/5-magical comp got walled by one resist item and the majors ran 4-23 against you.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Aurora as jungle — 4/5/10, with 5 deaths well over your norm. You went down 27s before the 20.5 Mini Prime fight, so that game-defining loss was fought without you, and you were in the 23.7 Fangtooth loss. As the jungler you set tempo; with four favored lanes the play was to invade and take a major, not to keep feeding fights you couldn't win.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Steel went 13/9/10 with 39k mitigated — you were the engage every fight, but 9 deaths (your norm is 3) means you were starting fights the team couldn't finish. You front the 20.5 and 23.7 wipes. Engaging is your job, but only when the team can follow; into a fed Gadget with no objective up, that's just feeding.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Sparrow was the favored carry and this was the rough one — 3/12, and you put 0 damage into objectives. 12 deaths means you kept getting caught in the forced fights (3.9, 9.8, then the team wipes). You can't carry a favored lane from the respawn screen; play safe, hit your Vanquisher at 25, and only fight when the team has numbers.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Shinbi was favored but 6 deaths and no magic resist into a 3-magical comp hurt. You were in the 20.5 and 23.7 losses. With a winning lane, your value is flanking picks, not joining the full-team dives into their Fangtooth that the team kept losing.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Gideon was favored into Renna (yours all game) but you finished 2/8 — 8 deaths because you kept being present for the team's bad trades (23.7, 25.8). Your Caustica landed at 24; as the mid you should be the one poking these fights down from range, not dying in the front of dives into their half.

threats: Chain-CC risk (2 hard-CC abilities, ~1.5s of lockdown): Grux Crush (knockup 0.5s), Gadget Security Gate (root 1s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Gadget. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — you brought none.
Dive threat on your backline: Yurei. Assign peel for your carry and ward your flanks.
synergy: Little hard CC on your side — you can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
Your damage is 4/5 magical — predictable; one magic-resist item answers most of it. Mix in a physical threat.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
ourKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

ourKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
ourKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
ourKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
ourKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

ourKits.combo: Rushing Beat dashes → Line Tempo wolves → Circle Rhythm shield → All-Kill! wolfpack ult
ourKits.winCondition: stack Track and unleash All-Kill! in a grouped fight
ourKits.playAgainst: spread vs the wolfpack; she's squishy without her shield up

ourKits.combo: Void Breach slow → Cosmic Rift → Black Hole on the grouped enemies
ourKits.winCondition: land Black Hole / Cosmic Rift on a clumped team for AoE burst
ourKits.passive: an ability-empowered basic tethers a target for bonus damage
ourKits.playWith: hard engage that clumps enemies into his Black Hole
ourKits.playAgainst: immobile with long cooldowns — dodge the skillshots and dive him once Black Hole is down

enemyKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
enemyKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
enemyKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
enemyKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
enemyKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

enemyKits.combo: Smash 'n Grab pull → Crush knockup → Warlord's Challenge stun → bleed-stacked basics
enemyKits.winCondition: land the pull→knockup chain to lock a target while bleed and AS shred them
enemyKits.passive: basics stack a bleed for sustained damage
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his knockup/stun window
enemyKits.playAgainst: telegraphed engage — bait Crush/Pull, then punish; kite his slow start

enemyKits.combo: Security Gate root → Sticky Mine → Tesla Dome zone ult
enemyKits.winCondition: root with the gate and trap a fight inside the Tesla Dome
enemyKits.passive: FDA stacks grant scaling magical power
enemyKits.playWith: frontline that holds enemies in her Dome
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge the gate; spread vs the Dome — she's immobile, dive her

enemyKits.combo: Ricochet stun → Bad Medicine zone → Infuse heal an ally → Neural Regenesis revive
enemyKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
enemyKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
enemyKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself — dive HER; bait the revive before committing

enemyKits.combo: Anima Burst / Whispering Echoes apply Soul Rip → Severance resets on Soul-Ripped targets → Soulstorm pulls them in
enemyKits.winCondition: chain Severance resets to stick to a target and burst in melee
enemyKits.passive: casting grants ranged empowered basics + attack speed
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up CC to hold the target she dashes onto
enemyKits.playAgainst: her chain needs Soul Rip resets — peel/disengage breaks it; punish when Severance is on cooldown

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over timeline majors (older film — no tower times; Fang/Prime/Orb only); itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
